summary: Iteration 52 - Base→Question Influence & base_reflection_he testing complete. All 11 backend tests PASSED. Features verified: (1) Body base generates physical/practical questions from body_questions bank, (2) Heart base generates relational/emotional questions from heart_questions bank, (3) Head base generates thinking/exploring questions from head_questions bank, (4) All questions are simple, one-sentence, actionable (no theory), (5) Day summary includes base_reflection_he field, (6) base_reflection_he is empty when no actions (correct behavior - nothing to reflect on), (7) base_reflection_he shows alignment text when base matches most_used_dept, (8) base_reflection_he shows misalignment text when base differs from most_used_dept, (9) ClosingLayer displays base_reflection_he when present, (10) Full flow works: select base → question influenced → action → reflection in summary, (11) Existing features still work (base selection, gating, department summary).
critical_code_review_comments: Base question override implemented correctly at lines 3505-3543 in server.py
BASE_QUESTIONS defined with 3 banks: body→order direction, heart→contribution direction, head→exploration direction
Body questions: physical/practical actions (clean, move, organize, practical tasks)
Heart questions: relational/emotional actions (kind words, listening, compassion, kindness)
Head questions: thinking/exploring actions (notice new things, organize ideas, learn, decide)
base_reflection_he logic at lines 5089-5096 correctly handles 3 conditions: chosen_base AND most_used_dept AND total_actions > 0
Alignment message: 'בחרת לפעול מה{chosen_he}, והפעולות שלך היום תאמו את הבחירה'
Misalignment message: 'בחרת לפעול מה{chosen_he}, אך רוב הפעולות היום נעו לכיוון ה{used_he}'
ClosingLayer.js correctly renders base_reflection_he at data-testid='closing-base-reflection' (line 152-155)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 05d47b99-88f1-44b3-a879-6c995634eaa0. Tests clear daily_questions, daily_bases, daily_answers for clean state before each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 tests base→question influence and base_reflection_he. Key findings: (1) When user selects a base, daily question is overridden from base-specific question bank (body/heart/head). (2) base_reflection_he only appears when: chosen_base exists AND most_used_dept exists AND total_actions > 0. (3) Question banks are hardcoded in server.py lines 3512-3539. (4) DIRECTION_TO_DEPT mapping: contribution→heart, recovery→body, order→head, exploration→head. (5) Test file test_base_question_reflection.py tests all 3 bases by clearing MongoDB collections and verifying question content matches expected bank.

backend_api_tests.test_set_body_base_and_verify_question: PASS - Body base generates physical questions, suggests 'order' direction
backend_api_tests.test_set_heart_base_and_verify_question: PASS - Heart base generates relational questions, suggests 'contribution' direction
backend_api_tests.test_set_head_base_and_verify_question: PASS - Head base generates thinking questions, suggests 'exploration' direction
backend_api_tests.test_questions_are_simple_one_sentence_a: PASS - All 12 questions verified simple, one-sentence, no theory
backend_api_tests.test_day_summary_returns_base_reflection: PASS - base_reflection_he field present in response
backend_api_tests.test_full_flow_body_base: PASS - Complete flow: set body base → get body question → submit action → check summary
backend_api_tests.test_base_selection_returns_allocations: PASS - All 3 bases with 4 allocations each
backend_api_tests.test_invalid_base_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid base values

frontend_ui_tests.base_gate_message_visible: PASS - 'בחר בסיס יומי כדי להמשיך לפעולה'
frontend_ui_tests.closing_reflection_text: PASS - 'היום עוד לא ביצעת פעולות. מחר יום חדש.'
frontend_ui_tests.base_reflection_conditional: PASS - Empty when no actions (correct behavior)

body: עשה פעולה פיזית קטנה שמסדרת משהו סביבך.
הזז את הגוף היום — אפילו הליכה קצרה.
heart: שלח מילה טובה למישהו שלא ציפה לזה.
עשה משהו קטן עבור מישהו קרוב.
תן לעצמך רגע של חמלה היום.
head: מצא דבר אחד חדש שלא שמת לב אליו קודם.
ארגן רעיון אחד שמסתובב לך בראש.
למד משהו קטן שלא ידעת.
קבל החלטה אחת שדחית.
